title: Smoky Kenyan Eggs Kebabs
description: Tender and energizing kebabs featuring smoky eggs and sweet applesauce, inspired by Kenyan flavors.
instructions: Beat the eggs in a bowl and season with salt and black pepper.
Heat a robata grill to medium-high heat, about 40068F.
Thread the eggs, onions, bell peppers, and mushrooms onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill with a little oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for about 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the eggs are cooked to your liking.
While the kebabs are cooking, deglaze the grill with the apple sauce by brushing it over the hot grates.
Once the kebabs are cooked, brush them with the apple sauce and serve hot.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or parsley, if desired.
